item.title: After a five year wait and three attempts, I finally got gay married to my gay husband
item.description:
It was pretty gay.
If this is considered a selfie and downvoted, fine, but go give someone a hug as well ?
Cat tax Front page edit: thank you all! Feeling much love

Please
hahahahaha
I love saying the word “canonically”
Where I am currently, working on a “Day in the life” post …
Stay sane everyone. Life is crazy.

item.title: Stop projecting your bullshit onto your kids.
item.dc:creator: sleeperkid

item.title: Stay safe on the roads
item.description: Sometimes I see posts on Imgur about motorcyclists who have close calls and always advertise the importance of dress for the slide and not the ride. On Tuesday my dad died. He did everything right, wore all the protection gear, it was a beautiful day, on a good road he knew and had been on thousands of times, he was not speeding, he had been riding since I could remember with probably more than 25 years experience. An oncoming car was on his side of the road. My point bikers is to make sure your loved ones know you love them. You can do everything right and it doesn't matter. I can't remember if the last time I seen my dad I told him I loved him, I hope I did. Edit I didn't expect this to blow up, thank you for your kind words.
item.dc:creator: CakeTastesLikePain

item.title: I have my MBA, but I don't think you should let the customer reflect ~Gord Downie
item.description: I would start by enslaving all left-handed people so they couldn't rise up against me. I would put two right Twix cookies in each package. Then I would convert the Left Factory into an orphanage for Elon Musk's children.

item.title: Saying goodbye to my friend tomorrow
item.description:
He was the best. Tonight he feasts on a t- bone.
Monday he had a seizure. The doctors found tumors that caused his spleen to burst. They are in and around his liver.
He gave us 12 years of his life.
Love you Peyton. Say hi to Vic for me.
item.dc:creator: pandafunk

item.title: First apartment too.
item.description: I went right into college after high school, then we got married the week after I graduated. We were married for 20 years and he decided sleeping with the neighbour was a good idea. So tonight, I am in my first place. I ordered pizza and am watching YouTube.

item.title: I heard you needed dog memes, so I got you dog memes
item.description:
True love
Say what you want, maltese are just fun little doggos
oh he's going to get some of it... one way or another
I will now demonstrate the doppler effect... BOooork
pretty dapper if you ask me
parental regret right there
We're still trying to support the friend that saved me from suicide earlier this year. His little doggy princes is slowly getting back on her paws but the treatment has proven prohibitively expensive We're almost at the end and we know the final tally so this is the part Siggy's owner can't cover If you can help them out, please do! And have a great day https://gofund.me/96113348
item.dc:creator: thedeadredhead
